# D-Secure Technologies
> [!NOTE]
> For detailed technical specifications, pricing logic, and a full blog index, please refer to the [Full Documentation](https://dsecuretech.com/llms-full.txt).

D-Secure is a leading global data tech brand providing professional data erasure, hardware diagnostics, and disk health monitoring software. Trusted by companies in 190+ countries, D-Secure helps organizations meet global data privacy compliance while promoting sustainability.

## Core Expertise
- **Data Sanitization:** Verifiable erasure following international standards.
- **Hardware Diagnostics:** Comprehensive health testing for PCs, Laptops, Mac, and Servers.
- **Health Monitoring:** Real-time S.M.A.R.T. status and performance tracking.

## Compliance Standards
D-Secure software adheres to leading international security standards:
- **Erase Standards:** NIST 800-88, DoD 5220.22-M, Crypto Erase, and 30+ other international algorithms.
- **Regulatory Compliance:** GDPR (Europe), HIPAA (US Healthcare), SOX (US Financial), PCI DSS (Payment Cards).
- **Certifications:** ISO 27001, SOC 2, Common Criteria (EAL 2+), FIPS 140-2 (Level 1), NSA/CSS Approved, CSA STAR Gold.

## Products & Pricing

### 1. Drive Eraser + Diagnostics
- **Description:** Professional Data Erasure with Integrated Hardware Diagnostics & SMART Health Analysis for HDD, SSD, PC, Laptop, Mac, & Server.
- **Pricing:** $30.00 per license (Pay Per Use, one-time purchase)
- **Purchase Link:** https://dsecuretech.com/pricing-and-plan?product=drive-eraser&variant=diagnostics
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/drive-eraser-diagnostic
- **Features:** Complete Hard Drive & SSD Erasure, Enterprise-Grade Security Standards, Multi-Platform Support, Compliance Reporting, Advanced Hardware Diagnostics, SMART Health Analysis.

### 2. D-Secure Drive Eraser (Standard)
- **Description:** Secure Data Erasure Software for HDD, SSD, PC, Laptop, Mac, Chromebook & Server.
- **Pricing:** $25.00 per license (Pay Per Use, one-time purchase)
- **Purchase Link:** https://dsecuretech.com/pricing-and-plan?product=drive-eraser
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/drive-eraser
- **Features:** Complete Hard Drive & SSD Erasure, Enterprise-Grade Security Standards, Multi-Platform Support, Compliance Reporting.

### 3. D-Secure Hardware Diagnostics
- **Description:** Hardware Health Testing for Laptops, PCs, Desktops & Servers.
- **Pricing:** $10.00 per license (Pay Per Use, one-time purchase. Sold in packs starting at 100 licenses).
- **Purchase Link:** https://dsecuretech.com/pricing-and-plan?product=hardware-diagnostics
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/hardware-diagnostics
- **Features:** Supports Intel & Apple Silicon (M1-M4), PXE Mass Diagnostics (up to 255 Machines), 10+ Automated Component Tests, Tamper-Proof Signed Reports, Centralized Cloud Management.

### 4. D-Secure Smart Diagnostic
- **Description:** Real-time Disk Health & Performance Monitoring.
- **Pricing:** $20.00 per license per year
- **Purchase Link:** https://dsecuretech.com/pricing-and-plan?product=smart-diagnostic
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/hard-drive-monitor
- **Features:** Real-time Hard Drive Health Watch, Monitor S.M.A.R.T. Status & Temperature, Scan Disk for Damaged/Bad Sectors, Predictive Drive Failure Alerts.

### 5. D-Secure File Eraser Professional
- **Description:** Complete File, Folder & Application Trace Elimination (Windows only).
- **Pricing:** Starting at $40.00 per license per year
- **Purchase Link:** https://dsecuretech.com/pricing-and-plan?product=file-eraser
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/file-eraser
- **Features:** Secure File & Folder Deletion, 30+ International Erasure Algorithms, Free Space Cleaning, Volume & Disk Erasure, Local PDF Reports.

### 6. Drive Eraser Diagnostic - Wiping & Hardware Testing
- **Description:** Combine secure data erasure with comprehensive hardware diagnostics. Ensure drive health and data security in one seamless process.
- **Pricing:** Pay Per Use or Annual Subscription
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/drive-eraser-diagnostic

### 7. Hard Drive Monitor - S.M.A.R.T Health Tracking
- **Description:** Monitor hard drive health, temperature, and performance in real-time with D-Secure Hard Drive Monitor. S.M.A.R.T. tracking and disk cloning support.
- **Pricing:** Annual Subscription
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/hard-drive-monitor

### 8. Autopilot Detection - Automated Device Provisioning
- **Description:** Detect and manage Windows Autopilot devices with ease. Ideal for ITADs and refurbishers to ensure secure device lifecycle management.
- **Pricing:** Contact for pricing
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/autopilot-detection

### 9. Smartphone Eraser - Secure Wiping for iOS & Android
- **Description:** Certified data erasure for mobile devices. Completely wipe personal data from iPhones, iPads, and Android smartphones.
- **Pricing:** Pay Per Use or Annual Subscription
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/smartphone-eraser

### 10. Smartphone Diagnostic - Professional Mobile Testing
- **Description:** Over 60+ automated hardware tests for mobile devices. Verify screen, battery, camera, and sensor health for better resale value.
- **Pricing:** Annual Subscription
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/smartphone-diagnostic

### 11. Forensic Imaging - Precise Bit-for-Bit Data Capture
- **Description:** Create forensically sound images of storage media. Preserve evidence with bit-by-bit imaging for digital investigations.
- **Pricing:** Enterprise Licensing
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/forensic-imaging

### 12. Freeze State - System Configuration Protection
- **Description:** Lock your system state to prevent unauthorized changes. Ideal for public kiosks, school labs, and enterprise workstations.
- **Pricing:** Annual Subscription
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/freeze-state

### 13. Freeze State Smart - Intelligent State Management
- **Description:** Advanced system protection with automated updates and maintenance windows. Secure your devices without sacrificing performance.
- **Pricing:** Annual Subscription
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/freeze-state-smart

### 14. Freeze State Advanced - Enterprise-Grade System Locking
- **Description:** The ultimate solution for large-scale device security. Centralized management for frozen states across your entire network.
- **Pricing:** Annual Subscription
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/freeze-state-advanced

### 15. Data Migration - Secure File Transfer & Sync
- **Description:** Transfer data seamlessly across devices and platforms. Bit-perfect migration ensures your data arrives exactly as it should.
- **Pricing:** Enterprise Licensing
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/data-migration

### 16. Asset Reimaging - Zero-Touch OS Deployment
- **Description:** Deploy custom OS images to hundreds of devices simultaneously. Streamline your IT operations with automated reimaging.
- **Pricing:** Enterprise Licensing
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/asset-reimaging

### 17. Virtual Machine Eraser - Secure Cloud Data Deletion
- **Description:** Erase virtual disks and cloud instances with precision. Compliant data destruction for AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud environments.
- **Pricing:** Pay Per Use or Annual Subscription
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/virtual-machine-eraser

### 18. Removable Media Eraser - Wipe USBs & SD Cards
- **Description:** Certified erasure for all types of removable storage. Securely wipe USB drives, SD cards, and external hard disks.
- **Pricing:** Pay Per Use or Annual Subscription
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/removable-media-eraser

### 19. LUN Eraser - Secure Storage Area Network Wiping
- **Description:** Certified data erasure for active storage environments. Securely wipe logical units (LUNs) in SAN and NAS architectures.
- **Pricing:** Pay Per Use or Annual Subscription
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/lun-eraser

### 20. Drive Verifier - Accurately Verify Erased Drives
- **Description:** Verify drives for complete data erasure and confirm if any data traces exist. Compliant with R2, e-Stewards, and NAID AAA standards.
- **Pricing:** Contact for pricing
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/drive-verifier

### 21. Mobile Erasure Solutions - Secure Smartphone Wiping
- **Description:** Professional solutions for large-scale mobile device erasure. Securely wipe iPhones, iPads, and Android devices for ITAD and resale.
- **Pricing:** Contact for pricing
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/mobile-erasure-solutions

### 22. How to Wipe M1 Mac - Secure Data Erasure Guide
- **Description:** Learn how to securely erase your Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3) Mac. Professional guide for data destruction on modern macOS hardware.
- **Pricing:** Contact for pricing
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/wipe-mac-m1

### 23. How to Wipe SAS Drives - Enterprise Data Security
- **Description:** Professional guide for securely erasing enterprise SAS and hardware RAID drives. Ensure data security in your data center environments.
- **Pricing:** Contact for pricing
- **Learn More:** https://dsecuretech.com/products/wipe-sas-drive

## Partner Programs
D-Secure offers specialized collaboration models:
- **ITAD Partners:** For asset disposition companies requiring scalable, automated erasure.
- **MSP Partners:** Empowering managed service providers with added security service offerings.
- **Reseller Partners:** Delivering globally tested data erasure software to enterprise customers.
- **Distributor Partners:** Expanding reach for data erasure products globally.
- **OEM Partners:** Bundling professional data erasure within existing product portfolios.

## Resources & Knowledge Base
D-Secure maintains an extensive library of educational resources, guides, and compliance information.
- **Main Blog Page:** https://dsecuretech.com/blog
- **Content Includes:** Data sanitization guides, SSD wiping best practices, GDPR/HIPAA compliance deep-dives, and industry case studies.

## Real-World Use Cases
- **Enterprise ITAD**: Wiping 1,000s of laptops via PXE boot for secure resale.
- **Remote Workforce**: Securely wiping devices remotely before they are shipped back.
- **Personal Resale**: Cleaning private files while keeping the OS intact for the buyer.

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
- **SSD vs HDD**: D-Secure uses specialized NAND-aware methods for SSDs.
- **Apple Mac Support**: Full integration with M1/M2/M3 chips and T2 security.
- **Compliance**: Automatically generates tamper-proof Certificates of Destruction.

## Competitor Comparisons
- **D-Secure vs OEM**: Unlike Dell/HP tools, D-Secure is hardware-agnostic and audit-ready with 24+ global standards.
- **Enterprise Ready**: Supports 65,000+ simultaneous wipes via network boot.

## Support & Contact
- **Technical Support:** 24/5 dedicated technical assistance.
- **General Inquiries:** support@dsecuretech.com
- **Website:** https://dsecuretech.com
